key_events_next_24h.name: US BTC Spot ETF Daily Flow Data

notes: BTC 월간 최고 상승, ETF 8일 연속 순유입, FOMC 3일 전 대기

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$78,000 as of Apr 25 05:00 UTC. Up ~13% in April, on track for best month in ~1 year. Key resistance: $79,000. Strategic buyer purchased 34,164 BTC ($2.54B) — largest since 2024.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 46 (Fear zone) — cautious but not extreme
BTC dominance: 58.1% (rising) — capital rotating to BTC as defensive asset
Spot ETF: 8 consecutive days positive inflows, $223M on Apr 23
USDT supply ~$150B (near ATH) — ample liquidity, structurally bullish
KelpDAO $292M exploit: DeFi TVL -$14B, altcoins fragile, BTC unaffected
Volume 15-20% below average — compression, expansion move likely within 3-5 sessions
CPI Mar 2026: 3.3% YoY (elevated) — no rate cuts expected near-term
FOMC Apr 28-29: hold priced in, but hawkish tone risk remains
analysis.macro_backdrop: No major macro releases on Apr 25. FOMC Apr 28-29 next major event — rate hold expected but hawkish surprise possible. GDP Q1 advance + PCE due Apr 30. Geopolitical: Iran/Hormuz tensions persist, oil elevated. Big Tech earnings (MSFT/Apple) Apr 29-30 beyond 24h window.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bullish (0.55): BTC momentum is clearly positive — 8 consecutive days of ETF inflows, +13% monthly gain, institutional mega-buy ($2.54B), rising BTC dominance, and growing USDT liquidity all point up. Confidence raised above threshold (0.50) — macro filter ACTIVE this cycle. FOMC 3 days away limits full conviction.
